COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SALLY WIATROLIK IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. JUDGMENT DEBTOR FAILED TO SHOW THAT ANY OF THE FUNDS CAN BE TRACED TO WORKER'S COMPENSATION PAYMENTS DEPOSITED INTO HER ACCOUNT. HOWEVER, JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS SHOWN THAT $2,485 OF THE FUNDS LEVIED UPON ARE PAID EARNINGS. PAID EARNINGS ARE 75% EXEMPT UNDER CODE OF CIV. PRO. SECTION 704.070(B)(2). ACCORDINGLY, $1,863.75 SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE REMAINING AMOUNT OF $2,920.83 SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT TOWARD THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-05-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. Claim Of Exemption of Sally Wiatrolik is granted in part and denied in part. Judgment debtor failed to show that any of the funds can be traced to worker's compensation payments deposited into her account. However, judgment debtor has shown that $2,485 of the funds levied upon are paid earnings. Paid earnings are 75% exempt under Code of Civ. Pro. section 704.070(b)(2). Accordingly, $1,863.75 shall be released to the judgment debtor. The remaining amount of $2,920.83 shall be released to the judgment creditor for payment toward the judgment. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
